verdict_reason: Reference search returns a wrong totalElements/totalPages and repeats the match on every page when page>1, and leaves a now-unused two-arg overload behind

todos.issue: PageImpl is built with the caller's pageable (offset = (page-1)*25), so a reference search on page>1 self-corrects total to offset+1 — GET /notifications?referenceNumber=X&page=2 reports totalElements=26, totalPages=2 and repeats the same single match on every page
todos.fix: Build the single-hit page against page 0 (e.g. PageRequest.of(0, listPageSize, sort)), or return Page.empty(pageable) when page > 1

todos.issue: The two-arg findAll(page, sort) overload now has no production caller — NotificationController calls the three-arg form; only NotificationServiceTest still exercises it
todos.fix: Delete the two-arg overload and update NotificationServiceTest to call findAll(page, sort, null)

todos.issue: Unsanitised user-supplied referenceNumber is written straight into two debug log statements, so arbitrary free text (including newlines) reaches the log stream
todos.fix: Log the trimmed reference only after it passes a format check, or cap/sanitise it before logging
